creator: fbsdbugs@codeslip.net
text:
Hello,

Winetricks has just (today) released v20250102 @ e20b2f6. Is there any chance you could update to that version instead of this commmit at the end of the year, please? (Especially since it's the one Mizuma is asking for: "latest upstream is winetricks-20250102!")

I checked the history and the commit I referenced is 2-3 commits newer with a direct parent of the commit you've tagged here.

I suppose it's not strictly necessary, but it would be nice to not have the little nag. :-)

Thanks!
